subject: Magikarp, a red-orange fish-like Pokemon with a wide open mouth, leaping out of blue water
description: A red-orange fish creature leaps out of the water with its wide mouth agape, scales catching the light. The body is broad and flat with prominent fins, and the face has the characteristic comically wide-eyed expression of the species. The water below is bright blue-green, with splashes and ripples visible at the point of exit. The sky above is pale blue, suggesting a clear day on open water. The composition captures the creature mid-leap, roughly at the apex of its jump, body angled back and tail trailing water.
foreground: Magikarp leaping from water, red-orange body, wide open mouth, fins extended
background: blue-green water with splashes, pale blue sky
